title: SimError wraps String in Server variant
description:
lichen-sim/src/client.rs:32-43 defines:
```rust
pub enum SimError {
    Server { code: u8, message: String },
    ...
}
```

The `message` field wraps a `String` instead of structured fields. This is fine for a binary crate (lichen-sim), but if the type is ever exported as a library API, consider replacing with typed error codes or Cow<'static, str>.
